title: Sub-Items: Copy to Another Board as a Main Item (Automation)
excerpt:

posts.author: jennyvaz (Jenny Vaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have board A that contains a client name and various products that they’ve bought with us. In other boards, I track each purchase by products i.e. 1 board is the tracker for 1 product.

What I’d like to do is create a main item in the product board and it updates Board A each time a client buys a product, add that to Board A as a sub-item clubbed under the respective client main item. They are connected boards.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jenny! So it sounds like you will want to add a mirror column in the subitems of your clients on Board A. Have you tried setting this up already? If you need any help, please let us know at support@monday.com!
